steps.data:
<?php
if ( ! post_type_exists( 'team-member' ) ) {
    add_action( 'init', function () {
        register_post_type( 'team-member', [
            'label'        => 'Team Members',
            'labels'       => [ 'name' => 'Team Members', 'singular_name' => 'Team Member', 'add_new_item' => 'Add New Team Member', 'edit_item' => 'Edit Team Member' ],
            'public'       => true,
            'show_in_rest' => true,
            'supports'     => [ 'title', 'custom-fields' ],
            'menu_icon'    => 'dashicons-businessperson',
            'has_archive'  => false,
            'rewrite'      => [ 'slug' => 'team-member' ],
        ] );
    } );
}

steps.code:
<?php
require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/image.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/media.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php';
$dir = '/wordpress/wp-content/plugins/acme/assets/team-members/';
$imgs = ['avatar10.jpg','avatar11.jpg','avatar12.jpg','avatar13.jpg','avatar14.jpg','avatar16.jpg','avatar17.jpg','avatar2.jpg','avatar6.jpg','avatar7.jpg','avatar8.jpg','avatar9.jpg'];
$members = [
    ['name'=>'Dr. Kevin Park','job_title'=>'Executive Clinical Director','credentials'=>'PhD, LCSW, CADC-II','department'=>'leadership','featured'=>1,'order'=>1],
    ['name'=>'Dr. Rachel Okafor','job_title'=>'Medical Director','credentials'=>'MD, FASAM','department'=>'medical','featured'=>1,'order'=>2],
    ['name'=>'James Thornton','job_title'=>'Licensed Clinical Social Worker','credentials'=>'LCSW, EMDR','department'=>'clinical','featured'=>0,'order'=>1],
    ['name'=>'Maria Santos','job_title'=>'Addiction Counselor','credentials'=>'CADC, MA','department'=>'clinical','featured'=>0,'order'=>2],
    ['name'=>'Amanda Wilson','job_title'=>'Family Therapist','credentials'=>'LMFT','department'=>'clinical','featured'=>0,'order'=>3],
    ['name'=>'Robert Chen','job_title'=>'Substance Use Counselor','credentials'=>'CADC-II, LPC','department'=>'clinical','featured'=>0,'order'=>4],
    ['name'=>'Lisa Hammond','job_title'=>'Case Manager','credentials'=>'LCSW','department'=>'clinical','featured'=>0,'order'=>5],
    ['name'=>'Dr. Thomas Brennan','job_title'=>'Staff Psychiatrist','credentials'=>'MD, MPH','department'=>'medical','featured'=>0,'order'=>1],
    ['name'=>'Patricia Moore','job_title'=>'Director of Operations','credentials'=>'MBA','department'=>'administrative','featured'=>0,'order'=>1],
    ['name'=>'Carlos Rivera','job_title'=>'Recovery Support Specialist','credentials'=>'CRSS','department'=>'support_staff','featured'=>0,'order'=>1],
    ['name'=>'Stephanie Taylor','job_title'=>'Intake Coordinator','credentials'=>'','department'=>'administrative','featured'=>0,'order'=>2],
    ['name'=>'Dr. Sarah Mitchell','job_title'=>'Registered Nurse, Detox Unit','credentials'=>'RN, CARN','department'=>'medical','featured'=>0,'order'=>2],
];
foreach ($members as $i => $m) {
    $pid = wp_insert_post(['post_type'=>'team-member','post_title'=>$m['name'],'post_status'=>'publish']);
    if (is_wp_error($pid)) continue;
    $path = $dir . $imgs[$i];
    if (file_exists($path)) {
        $up = wp_upload_bits(basename($path), null, file_get_contents($path));
        if (empty($up['error'])) {
            $att_id = wp_insert_attachment(['post_mime_type'=>'image/jpeg','post_title'=>$m['name'],'post_status'=>'inherit'], $up['file'], $pid);
            wp_update_attachment_metadata($att_id, wp_generate_attachment_metadata($att_id, $up['file']));
            update_post_meta($pid, 'photo', $att_id);
        }
    }
    update_post_meta($pid, 'job_title', $m['job_title']);
    update_post_meta($pid, 'credentials', $m['credentials']);
    update_post_meta($pid, 'department', $m['department']);
    update_post_meta($pid, 'featured_team_member', $m['featured']);
    update_post_meta($pid, 'display_order', $m['order']);
}
flush_rewrite_rules();

Meet Our Team

'; $content .= ''; wp_insert_post(['post_type'=>'page','post_title'=>'Our Team','post_name'=>'team','post_status'=>'publish','post_content'=>$content]);
